Video Library

Educational videos on holistic veterinary care, rehabilitation exercises, and treatment techniques to support your pet's health journey.

Herniated Disc Disease

Educational videos on various pet health conditions and diseases

0:45

Labrador Recovers Through Holistic Medicine

Connor couldn't walk when rescued from shelter. Through acupuncture, physical therapy, and PEMF sessions, he progressed from being unable to stand to running. Now adopted.

5:32

Emi's Story

20-week-old French Bulldog with misaligned T13 and S1 vertebrae plus bilateral hip dysplasia. Undergoing rehabilitation treatment with determination.

3:15

Frenchie Learns to Walk Again

Frijo arrived with IVDD. Receiving acupuncture and electroacupuncture treatments to reduce inflammation and promote healing in affected spinal discs.

4:22

Chesty Recovers after TWO back surgeries

Dog overcame paralysis following two neurosurgeries for herniated disc in neck. Through rehab, regained ability to walk independently.

2:48

Greyhound Learns to Walk Again

Tobi was paralyzed from birth due to spinal cord abnormality. Arrived in wagon, unable to stand. Now can run after acupuncture, PT, and underwater treadmill therapy.

3:56

Rex Finds His Stride Anew

Rex diagnosed with herniated disc. Treated with acupuncture and laser therapy (low-level light therapy). Gradually regained hindlimb use and ability to run.

2:34

French Bulldog Weezy Overcomes Herniated Disc

Weezy faced mobility challenges from herniated disc. Acupuncture and laser therapy provided pain relief and helped regain hind leg strength.

3:41

From Paralyzed to Walking: Riot's Story

Riot suddenly lost use of all legs. Intensive acupuncture and physical therapy helped him relearn walking. Now running.

4:18

Holistic Medicine Helps Pancho Stand Tall Again

Pancho arrived completely paralyzed. PT, acupuncture, and laser therapy enabled him to take steps and eventually run.

6:33

Herniated Disc Disease 10

Learn essential techniques and exercises for your pet's rehabilitation journey.

Need Personalized Guidance?

Schedule a consultation with our team to develop a customized treatment plan for your pet.

Holistic veterinary care and integrative wellness services dedicated to your pet's health.
